Name: discrete_integer_allocation
Title: Discrete Integer Programming for Defense Resource Allocation
Experiment: Modify the continuous LP model into a Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) model by changing the decision variables `x` to `Integer`. Continuous variables do not reflect the reality of deploying discrete units (e.g., ships, missile batteries). Evaluate how integer constraints affect the unmitigated risk and solve time.

Name: adjacent_island_network_effect
Title: Incorporating Adjacent Island Support and Network Effects
Experiment: Define a distance matrix or adjacency list for the islands. Modify the risk calculation constraint so that resources deployed on island A also provide a partial defense bonus (e.g., 20% effectiveness) to an adjacent island B. This encourages strategic clustering of resources at central hubs.

Name: minimax_robust_optimization
Title: Minimax Robust Optimization for Worst-Case Threat Scenarios
Experiment: Instead of minimizing the sum of expected risks based on fixed probabilities, assume the enemy is adversarial and will attack the most vulnerable island. Introduce an auxiliary variable `Z` representing the maximum unmitigated risk among all islands. Add constraints `Z >= unmitigated_risk[i]` for all `i`, and change the objective to minimize `Z`.
